ops.title: Filter degenerate pairs from the DPO export view
ops.description: E26's edit-distance probe (ledgers 310454b94 / cdaaa5115, verify 7e5efc013) found 7 degenerate chosen/rejected pairs in the DPO export view (chosen == rejected or near-zero edit distance) among the correction pairs. They contribute no preference signal and are exactly the small-edit-distance shape where DPO degrades (arXiv:2402.13228 — the probe's confirmed finding that killed the DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off). Add a degeneracy filter to the dpo TRL export view (identity + minimum-edit-distance floor), with a test seeding a degenerate pair and asserting exclusion. Artifacts: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E26/out.

ops.text: dpo export view excludes identical/near-identical chosen-rejected pairs
test seeds a degenerate pair and asserts it is excluded from the dpo view but not from sft/kto views
